name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Faint's {STR} Reduction effect +[Arg4]%. After playing Faint's Command Cards, temporarily {Steal} {STR} equal to [Arg3]% of Faint's ATK from all "Humanoid" enemies, triggers up to 3 times per turn.
